event.title: Ada ci mette il cuore in Terni, Italia

body.p:
A lecture of Ada & Zangemann with a workshop on micro:bit boards will be given on November 14th in a 4th year of the Mazzini primary school in Terni, Umbria (Italy). The event is private and reserved to the scholars for free, in the afternoon.
Gabriele Ponzo will give the lecture in Italian, together with the teacher Cinzia Ferracci, and then they will teach how to program micro:bit boards and will let the scholars practice with some funny exercises.
